response.justification: The candidate lacks the core embedded C expertise and Linux kernel experience required for this role, despite their broad software development background. Their focus has been primarily on web, mobile, and scripting languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Python-like tools) rather than embedded systems or security features. Native-level Japanese proficiency is not mentioned, which is a critical requirement.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with modern web technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, Ember.js)
Proven ability to work in diverse domains (AI infrastructure, DevOps, mobile apps, robotic arms)
Open-source contributions and community engagement (workshops, talks, GitHub projects)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded C programming or Linux kernel modifications
Minimal exposure to networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X) or hardware control for embedded devices
